task_name: Add Human Gate Candidate Fixture Coverage Map
goal: Add a Human Gate Candidate fixture coverage map and a local consistency test so documented MVP cases stay aligned with golden fixtures.
claims: BP-055 documents current Human Gate Candidate fixture coverage.
BP-055 adds a coverage-map consistency test to catch fixture/doc drift.
BP-055 does not change Human Gate Candidate runtime behavior or fixtures.
assumptions: BP-053 introduced the first Human Gate Candidate golden fixtures.
BP-054 made the shared review suite cover the Human Gate Candidate mock.
Coverage visibility should be added before setting the local MVP chain checkpoint.
dod: docs/HUMAN_GATE_CANDIDATE_FIXTURE_COVERAGE_v0.md exists and lists the current fixture cases.
tools/test-bluepilot-review-suite.cjs runs the Human Gate Candidate coverage-map test.
stop_conditions: Human Gate Candidate runtime or fixture changes become necessary
Effective approval, live Builder, auth, secrets, DB, deploy, task create, execute, approve, or push becomes necessary
prior_task_findings: BP-054 added Human Gate Candidate review-suite checks but did not document fixture coverage or guard doc/fixture drift.
